reviews.comment:
Buena atención! Y tenes un 5% de descuento -En general tenes un poco de espera

(Translated by Google)
Great service! And you get a 5% discount. -Generally, there's a bit of a wait.

reviews.comment:
El único problema es que de noche solo tienen una guardia para carga de combustible y siempre hay mucha cola porque solo atienden 2 surtidores.

(Translated by Google)
The only problem is that at night they only have one shift for refueling and there's always a long queue because they only service 2 pumps.

reviewReply.comment: Gracias si a partir de hoy estaremos poniendo una persona mas

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, it's a shame there's not much parking!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtel91Ui13RRAB

reviews.comment:
Voy a cargar combustible cuál paso por 4 estaciones de servicio YPF no teniendo éxito por falta de combustible, llegó al ACA Central de Libertador me informan que el app no funcionaba y solo era en efectivo. Pedorros cuando quieren efectivo no respetan ni a sus propios socios.

(Translated by Google)
I went to fill up my tank and passed by four YPF stations without success due to lack of fuel. I arrived at the ACA Central station on Libertador Avenue and they informed me that the app wasn't working and they only accepted cash. They're cheapskates; when they want cash, they don't even respect their own members.

reviewReply.comment:
Entendemos su enojo pero lamentablemente no depende de nosotros la app sino de los sistemas y no estamos especulando con efectivo somos el ACA y no lucramos con eso al contrario siempre ofrecemos todos los medios de pago lamentablemente a veces los sistemas no funcionan 
Gracias

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtaDk3Nm1nRRAB

reviews.comment:
Tardas 25 minutos mínimo es muy lento. Voy hace muchos años cada vez es más lento. Te atienden de 10 pero la verdad que si queres cargar rápido olvidate.

(Translated by Google)
It takes at least 25 minutes; it's very slow. I've been going there for years, and it gets slower every time. The service is excellent, but honestly, if you want to charge quickly, forget it.

reviews.comment:
Rareza.
Además de contar con automóviles muy antiguos en exposición (¡Visitar!), se trata del último edificio dentro de la Ciudad de Buenos Aires con expendio de combustibles en la planta baja.

(Translated by Google)
A rarity.

Besides having very old cars on display (a must-see!), it's the last building in Buenos Aires with a gas station on the ground floor.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtcGNMYi1nRRAB
